title: SemantyFish Poster - 2nd OSCARS AGM
author: Marketakis, Yannis
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This poster presents  SemantyFish,  an Open Science project funded under the OSCARS 1st Call for Open Science projects. The project transforms FishBase into a semantic web knowledge graph by leveraging standard vocabularies and ontologies to enhance the visibility, interoperability, and reuse. The project delivers an open biodiversity knowledge infrastructure, scalable semantic integration methods, and an evolution framework that ensures continuous alignment with evolving data sources, supporting advanced research and long-term sustainability.
steps_raw: This poster presents  SemantyFish,  an Open Science project funded under the OSCARS 1st Call for Open Science projects. The project transforms FishBase into a semantic web knowledge graph by leveraging standard vocabularies and ontologies to enhance the visibility, interoperability, and reuse. The project delivers an open biodiversity knowledge infrastructure, scalable semantic integration methods, and an evolution framework that ensures continuous alignment with evolving data sources, supporting advanced research and long-term sustainability.
